svg.title: RigVision PPE Detection Pipeline
svg.text: ~30 fps per zone group · BGR frames
cv/detection/detector.py · classes=[0] person only · batch inference for both cams per zone
conf=0.3 threshold · non-max suppression · returns bbox (x1,y1,x2,y2) + confidence
Posture fallback if rtmlib absent: aspect-ratio heuristic · ArUco fallback if no marker: personnel_id = None
One BoT-SORT instance per camera · persistent track_id across frames · Kalman filter + IoU association
3D bbox intersection test → zone_a | zone_b | unknown
④ PPE Detection — Two-Stage Pipeline · cv/PPE/ppe_monitor.py
process_multi() (pipeline) or process() (demo) called once per frame per person per camera
HuggingFace: ElenaRyumina/MASAI_models · FACE_CONFIDENCE=0.5 · predict on full frame
returns all face bboxes → filter to this person's bbox region
Stage B — EfficientNet-B0 Binary Classifiers · cv/PPE/classifier.py
Both classifiers run on the SAME padded crop in one pass · ImageNet normalisation · 224x224 resize
Stage C — Rolling Average Windows + Hysteresis (Schmitt-Trigger)
Dual-speed buffer prevents false positives (fast onset) and false negatives (slow hold)
Hair (~0.7) never crosses 0.97 · real hat (~0.99) crosses in 1 frame
Once "detected", brief occlusions do not flip back to "missing"
States: unknown → detected | missing | no_person · Streak must hold 3s before committing transition
annotate bbox → JPEG to cv/ppe_proof/ + base64 → rigvision:ppe:proof:{item}
⑤ Zone State Fusion — build_zone_states() · cv/zone_state.py
Runs each pipeline tick · reads rigvision:sensors:latest · staleness gate SENSOR_STALE_SECONDS=10
Zone colours (green/yellow/red) · Person dots in 3D scene · PPE violation badges · Live sensor bars
Pipeline runs at ~28-30 fps · zone_a and zone_b processed independently per tick

Files: cv/pipeline.py · cv/PPE/ppe_monitor.py · cv/PPE/classifier.py · cv/detection/detector.py · cv/tracking/tracker.py · cv/tracking/cross_camera.py · cv/tracking/triangulation.py · cv/zone_state.py
